attendees: CEO - Thomas Grant; CISO - Rachel Odom; CFO - Lisa Chen; COO - Mark Stevens; GC - Daniel Foster
agenda_items: 1. Q4 2024 metrics review; 2. 2025 security roadmap; 3. Budget approval; 4. Risk register; 5. Policy pipeline; 6. Regulatory update
topics_discussed: All 6 standing agenda items covered. Q4 2024 metrics: MTTD 3.2hrs (target <4); MTTR 5.8hrs (target <8); Vuln SLA 94% (target 95%); Training 97%; Vendor coverage 91%; 3 active exceptions. Budget discussion: $3.8M proposed, CEO asked about 10% contingency, approved with contingency reserve. Risk register: 2 new risks added (supply chain, AI model integrity). Policy pipeline: ISec policy review deferred to Q2 to incorporate AI governance requirements. Regulatory: DOT cybersecurity guidance for logistics operators under review.
decisions: Approved 2025 security budget $3.8M + 10% contingency; Accepted risk register updates; Approved deferral of ISec policy review to Q2
action_items: AI-Q1-001: CISO to draft AI governance section for ISec policy by March 31; AI-Q1-002: GC to assess DOT cybersecurity guidance impact by Feb 28; AI-Q1-003: COO to review fleet telemetry data classification
notes: Full attendance. All items covered. ISec policy review intentionally deferred to incorporate AI governance — not a missed review.

attendees: CEO - Thomas Grant; CISO - Rachel Odom; CFO - Lisa Chen; GC - Daniel Foster
agenda_items: 1. Q2 2025 metrics review; 2. ISec policy final review; 3. SOC 2 audit preparation; 4. Incident retrospective INC-2025-034; 5. Risk register; 6. Budget mid-year review
topics_discussed: 5 of 6 items covered (budget review deferred to Q4). Q2 metrics on target. ISec policy: CISO presented final draft incorporating engineering and data science feedback. Committee approved version 4.0 but noted the updated policy effective date should be post-September to allow 30-day communication period. Approved as 'pending final formatting.' INC-2025-034: supply chain compromise attempt detected and blocked. Lessons learned documented. SOC 2: evidence collection 60% complete, on track for Q4 audit.
decisions: Approved ISec policy v4.0 (pending final formatting and 30-day communication); Approved SOC 2 evidence collection plan; Accepted INC-2025-034 retrospective

notes: COO absent (client visit). Quorum met. ISec policy approved in principle at Q3 meeting but final version not yet published.

attendees: CEO - Thomas Grant; CISO - Rachel Odom; CFO - Lisa Chen; COO - Mark Stevens; GC - Daniel Foster
agenda_items: 1. Q3 2025 metrics review; 2. ISec policy publication status; 3. SOC 2 audit status; 4. 2026 budget planning; 5. Risk register; 6. Annual policy review summary
topics_discussed: All 6 items covered. Q3 metrics: MTTD 2.8hrs; MTTR 6.1hrs; Vuln SLA 96%; Training 98%. ISec policy: CISO reported v4.0 published October 1, 2025. 30-day communication completed. New effective date: October 1, 2025. SOC 2 audit: Baker Tilly engaged, fieldwork started October 7. 2026 budget: CISO proposed $4.1M (8% increase). CEO supportive, pending CFO review. Annual policy summary: 11 of 12 policies reviewed on schedule; ISec policy (Tier 1) took 12 months due to AI governance deliberation but was completed. All policies current as of Q4.
decisions: Approved 2026 security budget proposal for CFO review; Noted all 12 policies now current; Approved Q3 risk register updates

notes: Full attendance. ISec policy v4.0 now effective October 1, 2025. Committee acknowledged the extended review timeline was intentional to ensure AI governance thoroughness.
